meaning: n.<美口>碳水化合物食品,含糖食品
examples: Available as a flow enhancement to any CARBO ceramic proppant.
When I want to lose weight, I'll avoid carbo and anything fried.

Less than 15 miles away from McCartney's office, Larry Carbo sits in large wooden rocking chair.
If it were me, my carbo-loading (and post-race analgesics) would take the form of endless pints of Guinness.
